machine_note: Maker Nexus/home shop; verify exact machine before CAM.
assumptions: This is a pre-CAM operation graph, not verified G-code.
Verify feeds, speeds, work envelope, hold-down, and tool clearance at the machine.
Run air-cut or simulation before cutting instrument material.

operations.name: Review design package and mark datums
operations.tool: Calipers, square, marking knife, center punch
checks: All stock dimensions exceed finished dimensions plus allowance

operations.name: Create bore
operations.tool: Long brad-point bit, reamer, or ball/end mill for split blank
operations.workholding: Tailstock vise/carrier or flip jig with datum pins
checks: Bore diameter measured at both ends
operations.notes: Use the deep-bore technique reference when the bore is long and straight.

operations.name: Cut tone features
operations.machine: CNC router / drill press / laser template
operations.tool: 1/8 in upcut spiral, brad-point bits, or printed drill guide

operations.name: Validation and tuning pass
operations.tool: Chromatic tuner, calipers, scale, recording device
operations.datum: Same acoustic datum used in design.md

release_checks: Every operation has a datum and workholding method.
Every tool has a real machine available or an escalation note.
All tuning-critical features include trim allowance.
Validation.csv receives measured data after the first prototype.
